title: Xtra Fluffy Irish Eggplant Frittata
description: A winey, fluffy Irish dish featuring eggplant, binchotan-charcoal, and low-calorie-friendly ingredients, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe combines the richness of eggplant with the fluffiness of a frittata.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced eggplant and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, shredded irish cheddar, binchotan charcoal powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked eggplant mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
